author: soubhiksmp77
boma_naps
content: the fixture skips data because the spec doesn't define one it's optional per JSON-RPC 2.0 and I think the  client you are running is leaking Go's parser message, and you are  hitting a diff because rpc-compat strips error.message before comparing but not error.data really a gap in the matcher over in ethereum/hive, though dropping data on your side will get you green in the meantime I think before the fix.
